title: The ‘synthetic insider’: how AI deepfakes turned the fake employee into a corporate threat
summary: Companies are knitting together HR, security, legal and IT, said Adam Finkelstein of consultancy Alvarez & Marsal. Staff feed sensitive data into AI tools their employer never approved, said John Hultquist of Google Threat Intelligence Group.
